description_long: This is a modern claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a dual-material handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a sharply curved claw on the other, designed for pulling nails. The handle is straight with a slightly contoured ergonomic grip, likely made of a composite or metal core with a tan rubberized or polymer overlay for comfort and slip resistance. The shaft of the hammer is reinforced and features visible cutouts, suggesting a lightweight yet strong construction. The overall finish is clean and industrial, with no visible branding or damage. The hammer is suitable for a variety of urban tasks, from construction to general repairs.
description: A modern claw hammer with a metallic head and a tan ergonomic grip handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the hammer's head and the straight handle with a tan grip.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved claw, flat striking face, and ergonomic handle with visible cutouts in the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hammer's head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the claw and striking face, with emphasis on the handle's grip and shaft structure.
attribute_handle_type: Straight ergonomic handle with a tan rubberized or polymer grip overlay, featuring a slightly contoured shape for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a sharply curved claw on the other for nail removal; metallic construction with visible cutouts in the shaft.
